Game.title: Sequence Multiplayer Game Session
Game.description: Represents an online active, waiting, or completed game of Sequence.

id.description: Unique identifier of the game room.

players.description: List of active players in the game.

currentTurn.description: UID of the player currently making a move.

boardChips.description: Tracks which row_col cell has which player's color. Key format represents 'row_col'.

deckCount.description: Remaining cards count in the draw deck.

discardPile.description: Move and action log, as well as cards discarded.

lastPlay.description: Details of the most recently executed move.

winner.description: Player UID of the winner. Null if undecided.

winningSequences.description: Indices coordinates of cells making up the winning 5-in-a-row sequences.

games/{gameId}.description: Collection hosting all active and historic multiplayer game matches of Sequence.
